prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **W16 (QC16) quad-turbo** setup with **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbos (8 units total), each paired with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **Precision Turbo & Engine 1000HP-rated intercoolers** to sustain 1,800+ HP under sustained boost (2.2 bar peak). Engine internals reinforced with **Manley I-beam connecting rods**, **JE Pistons 9.0:1 forged slugs**, and **ARP Custom Age625+ head studs** for 10,000+ RPM reliability.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **Bosch Motorsport 1,200cc injectors** and **AEM 4150 high-flow fuel pumps** (dual setup), calibrated for **E85 flex-fuel** with **Innovate Motorsports LC-3 wideband O2 controllers** (4x sensors) for cylinder-specific AFR targeting (11.8:1 stoichiometric).

Chassis-specific **KW Suspensions V5R 3-way adjustable coilovers** with **Eibach ERS race springs** (800 lb/in front, 1,200 lb/in rear) and **AP Racing CCX4 6-piston monoblock calipers** clamping **Brembo HTC-960 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors** (front) and **380mm rotors** (rear), paired with **Pagid RSL29 brake pads** for 1.2G deceleration.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny x Bugatti Type 57SC-inspired widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 80mm rear fender flares) with **Vorsteiner V-FF 102 21" forged wheels** (front: 9.5x21 ET30, rear: 12.5x21 ET40) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (285/30 front, 355/25 rear).

**Novitec Torado-style front splitter** (3D-printed titanium, 40mm adjustable dive planes) and **Aeromotions active rear wing** (dual-element, 1,200mm span, 30° attack angle) with **Dymag carbon-fiber blades** for 1,800 lbs downforce at 250 mph.

**Luxury Trim Design carbon-fiber engine bay dress-up** (full W16 cover, **GReddy titanium exhaust tips** with **Akrapović titanium headers**), **LED Hella 5000K headlights** with **Morimoto XB35 projectors**, and **Vinyl Lab matte ‘Nocturne Black’ wrap** with **3M Scotchprint 1080 ‘Liquid Copper’ pinstripes** (0.5mm width).
